transport.authentication: 36-character API key takes precedence, otherwise host-only browser session

routes.success: HTTP 200 {id,shareUrl,upload:{type:"put",url,headers}} with a 15-character Cap alias and short-lived presigned R2 target
routes.validation: bounded exact camelCase JSON; finite optional media metadata; live optional folder; R2 integration; CAP_VIDEOS_DEFAULT_PUBLIC
routes.authorization: API-key-or-session actor must have the requested active organization and an active owner/member relationship
routes.idempotency_retry: source has no client key; every committed retry creates a new immutable alias/native UUID pair
routes.failure: HTTP 400 schema, 401 actor, 403 policy, 500 R2 signing or D1 persistence

routes.success: HTTP 200 {success:true}; uploaded is clamped to total
routes.validation: 15-character Cap alias, nonnegative JavaScript-safe integers, and DateFromString timestamp
routes.authorization: resolved actor must own the durable alias, native video, tenant, and upload row
routes.idempotency_retry: timestamp-stale, uploaded-regressing, and total-regressing calls are durable no-ops; equal retries converge
routes.failure: HTTP 400 schema, 401 actor, 404 tenant-safe missing/non-owner video, 500 D1 persistence

routes.success: HTTP 200 {success:true} after native tombstone and complete R2 prefix deletion
routes.validation: exact path with a 15-character Cap alias and an empty request body
routes.authorization: resolved actor must own the alias and the actor-scoped R2 prefix
routes.idempotency_retry: pending storage cleanup resumes from a durable D1 operation; completed aliases remain tombstoned and return 404
routes.failure: HTTP 400 alias/body, 401 actor, 404 tenant-safe missing/non-owner video, 500 R2 or D1 persistence

wire_and_storage.wire_identity: immutable 15-character Cap NanoID alias mapped to a native UUIDv7 video
wire_and_storage.upload_target: R2 S3-compatible PUT with UNSIGNED-PAYLOAD, signed content type and source metadata, If-None-Match: *, and 900-second expiry
wire_and_storage.share_url: verified organization custom domain when present, otherwise Frame WEB_URL /s/{legacyVideoId}
wire_and_storage.provider_boundary: Cloudflare R2 is the only storage provider; source Dub link creation is best effort and cannot gate the route

security_corrections.native_identity: a collision-safe UUID is authoritative while the released client keeps the exact NanoID wire shape
security_corrections.progress: Frame retains Cap's timestamp fence and additionally enforces monotonic uploaded and total bytes
security_corrections.delete: two-phase delete first records a D1 tombstone/pending cleanup, performs strongly consistent R2 prefix deletion, and then finalizes D1 without deleting the alias
security_corrections.upload: the presigned PUT cannot escape the actor/alias prefix or overwrite an existing object
